allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = sys.stdin.read\(\); lines = [l for l in data.split\('\\n'\) if l.strip\(\)]; [print\(json.loads\(l\).get\('role',''\), ':', str\(json.loads\(l\).get\('content',''\)\)[:500]\) for l in lines[-5:] if l]")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); j.workflow_runs?.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(r => console.log\(r.status, r.conclusion, r.name, r.html_url\)\)")
